{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Consultant Gardener
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] planned to claim he was attacked by [[Consultant]] [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
